Higher Education Council Formatted CV

Rate Us

Short CV

Assoc. Prof. Taha BAHSİ graduated from Cumhuriyet University Faculty of Medicine in 2005. In 2014, he completed his specialization at Gazi University, Department of Medical Genetics. He received the title of Associate Professor in 2020.
